name: 10pk Storage Filing Box Medium Duty Letter/Legal - up&up™: Paperboard File Sorters, White, 16.3"x12.8"x10.5"
description:
You'll get plenty of use out of the 10-Pack Storage Filing Box Medium-Duty Letter/Legal from up&up™. These stackable lidded boxes with medium-duty strength for storage with or without shelving can take on any uncluttering task with ease and style. Each box comes with handle cutouts on the sides for convenient carrying and shifting, as well as a "Contents" titled ruled label for easy organization and identification. Use them for your bank statements, medical records, insurance papers or office files and keep your paperwork organized in chic style.

up&up™: We believe making smart choices for the people, places, and pets in your life should be easy and affordable. And, having quality you can trust should be a given. That’s why you can count on our promise – caring for your everyday in every way.

Satisfaction guaranteed – Love it or your money back.
